## Improvement Type
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Memory usage improvement
- [ ] Better error handling
- [ ] Logging improvements
- [ ] Code organization
- [ ] Design pattern implementation
- [ ] Dependency management

## Current Situation
Describe the current code/situation that could be improved:

## Proposed Improvement
Describe your proposed improvement:

## Code Example
If applicable, provide a code example:

### Current Code
```csharp
// Current implementation
```

### Proposed Code
```csharp
// Proposed improvement
```

## Benefits
What benefits would this improvement provide?
- [ ] Better performance
- [ ] Reduced memory usage
- [ ] Improved maintainability
- [ ] Better error handling
- [ ] Easier testing
- [ ] Better compliance with .NET guidelines

## Impact Assessment
- **Breaking Changes**: Yes/No
- **Performance Impact**: Positive/Negative/Neutral
- **Complexity**: Does this make the code more or less complex?

## Testing
How should this improvement be tested?
- [ ] Unit tests needed
- [ ] Integration tests needed
- [ ] Performance benchmarks needed
- [ ] Manual testing required

## Additional Context
Any other context about the improvement, such as:
- References to best practices or guidelines
- Similar implementations in other libraries
- Performance metrics or benchmarks
